# Tac UI

> Cross-platform design system — 47+ React web components, 27 React Native components, design tokens, and icons.

## Packages

| Package | Install | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| `@tac-ui/web` | `pnpm add @tac-ui/web` | React web component library |
| `@tac-ui/native` | `pnpm add @tac-ui/native` | React Native component library |
| `@tac-ui/tokens` | `pnpm add @tac-ui/tokens` | Design tokens (color, spacing, typography, motion) |
| `@tac-ui/icon` | `pnpm add @tac-ui/icon` | Web icons (lucide-react + TacLogo) |
| `@tac-ui/icon-native` | `pnpm add @tac-ui/icon-native` | Native icons (lucide-react-native + TacLogo) |
| `@tac-ui/shared` | `pnpm add @tac-ui/shared` | Shared types & interfaces |

---

## Web (`@tac-ui/web`)

### Quick Start

```bash
pnpm add @tac-ui/web @tac-ui/icon @tac-ui/tokens
```

```tsx
import { TacProvider } from '@tac-ui/web';
import { tacPreset } from '@tac-ui/web/tailwind';

// tailwind.config.ts
export default { presets: [tacPreset] };

// App
export default function App({ children }) {
  return <TacProvider defaultTheme="system">{children}</TacProvider>;
}
```

### Styling

- Tailwind CSS 4 with `cn()` utility (clsx + tailwind-merge)
- CSS custom properties for tokens: `var(--point)`, `var(--border)`, etc.
- CVA (class-variance-authority) for component variants

```tsx
import { cn } from '@tac-ui/web';
```

### Components

#### Button

```tsx
<Button variant="primary" size="md">Click</Button>
<Button variant="point" leftIcon={<Star size={16} />}>Favorite</Button>
<Button variant="outline" size="sm" iconOnly><Search size={16} /></Button>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'primary' \| 'secondary' \| 'outline' \| 'ghost' \| 'point' \| 'destructive'` | `'primary'` |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| iconOnly | `boolean` | `false` |
| leftIcon / rightIcon | `ReactNode` | - |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

#### Input

```tsx
<Input label="Email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
<Input error errorMessage="Required" leftIcon={<Search size={16} />} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| label | `string` | - |
| helperText | `string` | - |
| error | `boolean` | `false` |
| errorMessage | `string` | - |
| leftIcon / rightIcon | `ReactNode` | - |
| rightButton | `ReactNode` | - |

#### Textarea

```tsx
<Textarea label="Message" placeholder="Type here..." />
<Textarea error errorMessage="Too short" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| label | `string` | - |
| helperText | `string` | - |
| error / errorMessage | `boolean` / `string` | `false` / - |

#### Select

```tsx
<Select
  label="Country"
  options={[{ value: 'us', label: 'United States' }]}
  value={selected}
  onChange={setSelected}
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| options | `{ value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }[]` | `[]` |
| value | `string` | - |
| onChange | `(value: string) => void` | - |
| selectSize | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |

#### Combobox

```tsx
<Combobox
  options={[{ value: 'react', label: 'React' }]}
  value={value}
  onChange={setValue}
  placeholder="Search..."
/>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| options | `{ value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }[]` | `[]` |
| emptyText | `string` | `'No results found'` |

#### Card

```tsx
<Card variant="default">
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle>Title</CardTitle>
    <CardDescription>Description</CardDescription>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>Body</CardContent>
  <CardFooter><Button size="sm">Action</Button></CardFooter>
</Card>

<Card interactive tilt variant="accent">Premium</Card>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'accent' \| 'glass' \| 'flat'` | `'default'` |
| interactive | `boolean` | `false` |
| tilt | `boolean` | `false` |

Sub-components: `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, `CardDescription`, `CardContent`, `CardFooter`

#### MorphingCard

```tsx
<MorphingCard
  layoutId="card-1"
  expanded={expanded}
  onExpandedChange={setExpanded}
  preview={<div>Compact</div>}
  detail={<div>Expanded</div>}
/>
```

#### Badge

```tsx
<Badge variant="success">Active</Badge>
<Badge variant="glass" interactive>Click</Badge>
<Badge count={5} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'secondary' \| 'destructive' \| 'outline' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' \| 'info' \| 'glass'` | `'default'` |
| interactive | `boolean` | `false` |
| count | `number` | - |

#### Checkbox

```tsx
<Checkbox label="Accept terms" />
<Checkbox checked={checked} onChange={(e) => setChecked(e.target.checked)} />
<Checkbox indeterminate filled />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| indeterminate | `boolean` | `false` |
| filled | `boolean` | `false` |
| disabled | `boolean` | `false` |

#### Radio & RadioGroup

```tsx
<RadioGroup value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <Radio radioValue="a" label="Option A" />
  <Radio radioValue="b" label="Option B" />
</RadioGroup>
```

#### Switch

```tsx
<Switch label="Dark Mode" checked={on} onChange={setOn} />
```

#### AnimatedToggle

```tsx
<AnimatedToggle
  checked={dark}
  onChange={setDark}
  iconOn={<Moon size={14} />}
  iconOff={<Sun size={14} />}
/>
```

#### Slider

```tsx
<Slider defaultValue={50} min={0} max={100} />
<Slider label="Volume" showValue filled />
```

#### SegmentController

```tsx
<SegmentController
  options={[{ value: 'day', label: 'Day' }, { value: 'week', label: 'Week' }]}
  value={period}
  onChange={setPeriod}
/>
<SegmentController options={opts} mode="multi" size="sm" collapsible />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| mode | `'single' \| 'multi'` | `'single'` |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| fullWidth | `boolean` | `false` |
| collapsible | `boolean` | `false` |

#### DatePicker

```tsx
<DatePicker label="Start date" value={date} onChange={setDate} />
<DatePicker mode="datetime" use24Hour />
<DatePicker mode="month" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| mode | `'date' \| 'datetime' \| 'month'` | `'date'` |
| use24Hour | `boolean` | `true` |
| minuteStep | `number` | `1` |
| minDate / maxDate | `Date` | - |

#### ColorPicker

```tsx
<ColorPicker label="Brand color" value={color} onChange={setColor} />
```

#### Label

```tsx
<Label htmlFor="email">Email</Label>
<Label required>Username</Label>
<Label showOptional>Nickname</Label>
<Label tooltip="We'll never share your email">Email</Label>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| htmlFor | `string` | - |
| required | `boolean` | `false` |
| showOptional | `boolean` | `false` |
| tooltip | `ReactNode` | - |

#### SensitiveInput

```tsx
<SensitiveInput value={apiKey} onChange={(e) => setApiKey(e.target.value)} placeholder="Enter API key" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `string` | - |
| onCopy | `() => void` | - |
| onReveal | `() => void` | - |

States: `masked` → click/Enter/Space to reveal, `revealed` → Escape to re-mask, `empty` → standard text input. Hover shows copy button.

#### Tabs

```tsx
<Tabs defaultValue="tab1" variant="underline">
  <TabsList>
    <TabTrigger value="tab1">General</TabTrigger>
    <TabTrigger value="tab2">Settings</TabTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabContent value="tab1">General content</TabContent>
  <TabContent value="tab2">Settings content</TabContent>
</Tabs>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'underline' \| 'pill' \| 'outline' \| 'icon'` | `'underline'` |

#### Accordion

```tsx
<Accordion type="single" defaultValue="item-1">
  <AccordionItem value="item-1">
    <AccordionTrigger value="item-1">Section 1</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent value="item-1">Content 1</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| type | `'single' \| 'multiple'` | `'single'` |
| glass | `boolean` | `false` |
| outline | `boolean` | `true` |

#### Collapsible

```tsx
<Collapsible label="Show details">
  <p>Hidden content revealed on toggle.</p>
</Collapsible>
<Collapsible label="Open by default" defaultOpen>
  <p>Visible initially.</p>
</Collapsible>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| label | `ReactNode` | - |
| open | `boolean` | - |
| defaultOpen | `boolean` | `false` |
| onOpenChange | `(open: boolean) => void` | - |

#### Dialog

```tsx
<Dialog open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)}>
  <DialogHeader>
    <DialogTitle>Confirm</DialogTitle>
    <DialogDescription>Are you sure?</DialogDescription>
  </DialogHeader>
  <DialogFooter>
    <Button variant="ghost" onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>Cancel</Button>
    <Button onClick={handleConfirm}>Confirm</Button>
  </DialogFooter>
</Dialog>
```

#### Modal

```tsx
<Modal open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} size="md">
  <ModalHeader><ModalTitle>Edit Profile</ModalTitle></ModalHeader>
  <Input label="Name" />
  <ModalFooter><Button>Save</Button></ModalFooter>
</Modal>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl'` | `'md'` |

Sub-components: `ModalHeader`, `ModalIcon`, `ModalTitle`, `ModalDescription`, `ModalFooter`

#### Drawer

```tsx
<Drawer open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} side="right">
  <DrawerHeader><DrawerTitle>Settings</DrawerTitle></DrawerHeader>
  <DrawerBody>Content</DrawerBody>
  <DrawerFooter><Button>Save</Button></DrawerFooter>
</Drawer>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| side | `'left' \| 'right' \| 'top' \| 'bottom'` | `'right'` |

#### Alert

```tsx
<Alert variant="success" icon={<CheckCircle size={16} />} dismissible>
  <AlertTitle>Saved</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Your changes have been saved.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' \| 'info' \| 'glass'` | `'default'` |
| dismissible | `boolean` | `false` |

#### Banner

```tsx
<Banner variant="default" title="New feature available" description="Check out the latest updates." />
<Banner variant="warning" title="Maintenance scheduled" dismissible onDismiss={() => {}} />
<Banner variant="error" title="Service disruption" />
<Banner variant="success" title="Deployment complete" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'warning' \| 'error' \| 'success'` | `'default'` |
| title | `string` | - |
| description | `string` | - |
| icon | `ReactNode` | - |
| dismissible | `boolean` | `false` |
| onDismiss | `() => void` | - |

#### Toast

```tsx
<ToastProvider position="bottom-right" maxToasts={5}>
  <App />
</ToastProvider>

const { toast, dismiss, dismissAll } = useToast();
toast('Saved', { variant: 'success', duration: 3000 });
```

| Option | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'success' \| 'error' \| 'warning' \| 'info'` | `'default'` |
| duration | `number` (ms, 0 = persistent) | `5000` |

#### Snackbar

```tsx
<Snackbar open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} variant="success" action="Undo" onAction={handleUndo}>
  Item deleted
</Snackbar>
```

#### Dropdown

```tsx
<Dropdown trigger={<Button variant="outline">Menu</Button>} align="start">
  <DropdownItem onClick={handleEdit}>Edit</DropdownItem>
  <DropdownDivider />
  <DropdownItem destructive onClick={handleDelete}>Delete</DropdownItem>
</Dropdown>
```

Sub-components: `DropdownTitle`, `DropdownDivider`, `DropdownItem`, `DropdownSearch`

#### Tooltip

```tsx
<Tooltip content="Save changes" placement="top">
  <Button iconOnly><Save size={16} /></Button>
</Tooltip>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| placement | `'top' \| 'bottom' \| 'left' \| 'right'` | `'top'` |
| delay | `number` (ms) | `200` |

#### Link

```tsx
<Link href="/docs" variant="inline">Documentation</Link>
<Link href="/about" variant="plain">About</Link>
<Link href="https://github.com" variant="inline" external>GitHub</Link>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'inline' \| 'plain' \| 'current'` | `'inline'` |
| external | `boolean` | `false` |

#### Popover

```tsx
<Popover trigger={<Button>Options</Button>} side="bottom" align="start">
  <PopoverHeader>Filter</PopoverHeader>
  <PopoverBody><Input placeholder="Search..." /></PopoverBody>
  <PopoverFooter><Button size="sm">Apply</Button></PopoverFooter>
</Popover>
```

#### Avatar

```tsx
<Avatar src="/photo.jpg" alt="User" size="md" />
<Avatar initials="JH" size="lg" showStatus />
<Avatar icon={<User size={20} />} animated />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl'` | `'md'` |
| showStatus | `boolean` | `false` |
| animated | `boolean` | `false` |

#### Chip

```tsx
<Chip variant="filter">Active</Chip>
<Chip variant="input" leftIcon={<Tag size={12} />} onDelete={() => {}}>React</Chip>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'filter' \| 'assist' \| 'suggestion' \| 'input' \| 'glass'` | `'filter'` |

#### Progress

```tsx
<Progress value={75} />
<Progress value={60} variant="circular" size={80} showLabel />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'linear' \| 'circular'` | `'linear'` |
| barSize | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |

#### Meter

```tsx
<Meter value={42} label="Storage used" />
<Meter value={75} label="High usage" />
<Meter value={72} label="Storage" customValue="7.2 GB / 10 GB" />
<Meter value={60} label="Progress" showValue={false} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| value | `number` | - |
| min | `number` | `0` |
| max | `number` | `100` |
| label | `string` | - |
| customValue | `string` | - |
| showValue | `boolean` | `true` |

Bar color changes by fill level: green (<60%), yellow (60–80%), red (>80%).

#### Table

```tsx
<Table>
  <TableHeader>
    <TableRow><TableHead>Name</TableHead><TableHead>Email</TableHead></TableRow>
  </TableHeader>
  <TableBody>
    <TableRow><TableCell>John</TableCell><TableCell>john@example.com</TableCell></TableRow>
  </TableBody>
</Table>
```

#### Breadcrumb

```tsx
<Breadcrumb>
  <BreadcrumbList>
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/">Home</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
    <BreadcrumbSeparator />
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/docs">Docs</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
  </BreadcrumbList>
</Breadcrumb>
```

#### Pagination

```tsx
<Pagination>
  <PaginationContent>
    <PaginationPrevious onClick={prev} />
    <PaginationItem>1</PaginationItem>
    <PaginationEllipsis />
    <PaginationNext onClick={next} />
  </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>
```

#### Stepper

```tsx
<Stepper activeStep={1} orientation="horizontal">
  <Step title="Account" description="Create account" />
  <Step title="Profile" />
  <Step title="Done" />
</Stepper>
```

#### Divider

```tsx
<Divider />
<Divider variant="thick" />
<Divider label="OR" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'full' \| 'inset' \| 'thick' \| 'withLabel'` | `'full'` |

#### Skeleton

```tsx
<Skeleton variant="text" lines={3} />
<Skeleton variant="circular" width={48} height={48} />
<Skeleton variant="rectangular" width="100%" height={200} />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'rectangular' \| 'circular' \| 'text'` | `'rectangular'` |
| animation | `'shimmer' \| 'pulse'` | `'shimmer'` |

#### Indicator

```tsx
<Indicator variant="success" animated />
<Indicator variant="error" size="lg" />
```

#### CodeBlock

```tsx
<CodeBlock code={`const x = 1;`} language="typescript" showLineNumbers showCopyButton />
```

#### ClipboardText

```tsx
<ClipboardText text="npm install @tac-ui/web" />
<ClipboardText text="sk-abc123..." size="sm" />
<ClipboardText text="192.168.1.1" size="lg" />
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| text | `string` | - |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| onCopy | `() => void` | - |

#### EmptyState

```tsx
<EmptyState icon={<Inbox size={48} />} title="No items" description="Create your first item." action={<Button>Create</Button>} />
```

#### VStack & HStack

```tsx
<VStack spacing="m" align="center">
  <Input label="Name" />
  <Button>Submit</Button>
</VStack>

<HStack spacing="sm" justify="between">
  <Badge>Tag 1</Badge>
  <Badge>Tag 2</Badge>
</HStack>
```

#### Grid

```tsx
<Grid variant="3up" gap="md">
  <GridItem>A</GridItem>
  <GridItem>B</GridItem>
  <GridItem>C</GridItem>
</Grid>
<Grid variant="2-1" gap="lg">
  <GridItem>Wide</GridItem>
  <GridItem>Narrow</GridItem>
</Grid>
```

| Prop (Grid) | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'2up' \| 'side-by-side' \| '2-1' \| '1-2' \| '1-3up' \| '3up' \| '4up' \| '6up' \| '1-2-4up'` | `'2up'` |
| gap | `'none' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |

| Prop (GridItem) | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| span | `number` | - |

### Charts

```tsx
import { BarChart, LineChart, PieChart, DonutChart } from '@tac-ui/web';

<BarChart data={[{ label: 'Jan', value: 30 }]} height={200} showGrid showValues />
<LineChart data={data} height={200} showArea showDots color="var(--point)" />
<PieChart data={[{ label: 'A', value: 40, color: 'var(--chart-1)' }]} size={200} showLabels />
<DonutChart data={data} size={200} strokeWidth={20} />
```

### Layout

```tsx
import {
  PageLayout, Header, Sidebar, SidebarHeader, SidebarGroup, SidebarItem,
  Main, Footer, Container, FloatingMenuBar, FloatingMenuItem,
} from '@tac-ui/web';
```

#### Sidebar

```tsx
<Sidebar width={240} collapsible collapsed={collapsed} onCollapse={setCollapsed} position="left" rounded>
  <SidebarHeader label="Navigation" icon={<Menu size={18} />} />
  <SidebarGroup label="Nav" icon={<Menu size={14} />} collapsible defaultOpen>
    <SidebarItem active>Dashboard</SidebarItem>
    <SidebarItem>Settings</SidebarItem>
  </SidebarGroup>
</Sidebar>
```

#### Preset Page Layouts

```tsx
import { SidebarPage, DashboardPage, HolyGrailPage } from '@tac-ui/web';
```

Available: `SingleColumnPage`, `SidebarPage`, `GridPage`, `DashboardPage`, `SplitPage`, `StackedPage`, `DualSidebarPage`, `HolyGrailPage`, `AsymmetricPage`, `AppPage`

#### FloatingMenuBar

```tsx
<FloatingMenuBar position="bottom-center" blur bordered>
  <FloatingMenuItem icon={<Home size={18} />} label="Home" active />
  <FloatingMenuItem icon={<Search size={18} />} label="Search" />
</FloatingMenuBar>
```

### Hooks

```tsx
import {
  useFocusTrap,     // Trap focus within element
  useFocusRestore,  // Restore focus on unmount
  useRovingIndex,   // Arrow key navigation
  useSpotlight,     // Spotlight reveal effect
  useSidebarContext, // Sidebar collapsed state
  useTacTheme,      // Theme preference
} from '@tac-ui/web';
```

### Motion Constants

```tsx
import { tacSpring, dropdownMotionVariants, panelVariants, fadeVariants, exitVariants, pageEntrance } from '@tac-ui/web';
```

---

## Native (`@tac-ui/native`)

### Quick Start

```bash
pnpm add @tac-ui/native @tac-ui/icon-native @tac-ui/tokens
```

```tsx
import { TacNativeProvider } from '@tac-ui/native';

export default function App() {
  return (
    <TacNativeProvider defaultPreference="system">
      <YourApp />
    </TacNativeProvider>
  );
}
```

### Styling

- `StyleSheet.create()` + theme values from `useTacNativeTheme()`
- Tokens via `theme.colors.*`, `theme.spacing.*` from context
- Spring animations from `springConfigs`

```tsx
import { useTacNativeTheme, createStyles } from '@tac-ui/native';

const { theme } = useTacNativeTheme();
```

### Components

#### Button

```tsx
<Button variant="primary" size="md" onPress={handlePress}>Click</Button>
<Button variant="point" leftIcon={<Star size={16} />}>Favorite</Button>
<Button variant="outline" size="sm">Outline</Button>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'primary' \| 'secondary' \| 'outline' \| 'ghost' \| 'point' \| 'destructive'` | `'primary'` |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` |
| leftIcon / rightIcon | `ReactNode` | - |

#### Input

```tsx
<Input label="Email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
<Input error errorMessage="Required" />
```

#### Textarea

```tsx
<Textarea label="Message" placeholder="Type here..." />
```

#### Select

```tsx
<Select
  label="Country"
  options={[{ value: 'us', label: 'United States' }]}
  value={selected}
  onChange={setSelected}
/>
```

#### Combobox

```tsx
<Combobox
  options={[{ value: 'react', label: 'React' }]}
  value={value}
  onChange={setValue}
/>
```

#### Card

```tsx
<Card variant="default">
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle>Title</CardTitle>
    <CardDescription>Description</CardDescription>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>Body</CardContent>
  <CardFooter><Button size="sm">Action</Button></CardFooter>
</Card>
```

| Prop | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| variant | `'default' \| 'accent' \| 'glass' \| 'flat'` | `'default'` |

#### Badge

```tsx
<Badge variant="success">Active</Badge>
<Badge count={5} />
```

#### Avatar

```tsx
<Avatar src={uri} size="md" />
<Avatar initials="JH" size="lg" showStatus />
```

#### Chip

```tsx
<Chip variant="filter">Active</Chip>
<Chip variant="input" onDelete={() => {}}>React</Chip>
```

#### Checkbox

```tsx
<Checkbox label="Accept terms" />
<Checkbox checked={checked} onChange={setChecked} />
<Checkbox indeterminate filled />
```

#### Radio & RadioGroup

```tsx
<RadioGroup value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <Radio radioValue="a" label="Option A" />
  <Radio radioValue="b" label="Option B" />
</RadioGroup>
```

#### Switch

```tsx
<Switch label="Notifications" checked={on} onChange={setOn} />
```

#### Toggle & AnimatedToggle

```tsx
<Toggle checked={on} onChange={setOn} />
<AnimatedToggle
  checked={dark}
  onChange={setDark}
  iconOn={<Moon size={14} />}
  iconOff={<Sun size={14} />}
/>
```

#### Tabs

```tsx
<Tabs defaultValue="tab1" variant="underline">
  <TabsList>
    <TabTrigger value="tab1">General</TabTrigger>
    <TabTrigger value="tab2">Settings</TabTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabContent value="tab1">General content</TabContent>
</Tabs>
```

#### SegmentController

```tsx
<SegmentController
  options={[{ value: 'day', label: 'Day' }]}
  value={period}
  onChange={setPeriod}
/>
```

#### Accordion

```tsx
<Accordion type="single" defaultValue="item-1">
  <AccordionItem value="item-1">
    <AccordionTrigger value="item-1">Section 1</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent value="item-1">Content 1</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
```

#### Dialog

```tsx
<Dialog open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)}>
  <DialogHeader><DialogTitle>Confirm</DialogTitle></DialogHeader>
  <DialogFooter>
    <Button variant="ghost" onPress={() => setOpen(false)}>Cancel</Button>
    <Button onPress={handleConfirm}>OK</Button>
  </DialogFooter>
</Dialog>
```

#### Dropdown

```tsx
<Dropdown trigger={<Button variant="outline">Menu</Button>}>
  <DropdownItem onPress={handleEdit}>Edit</DropdownItem>
  <DropdownDivider />
  <DropdownItem onPress={handleDelete}>Delete</DropdownItem>
</Dropdown>
```

#### Alert

```tsx
<Alert variant="success">
  <AlertTitle>Saved</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Changes saved.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
```

#### Snackbar

```tsx
<Snackbar open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} variant="success">
  Item deleted
</Snackbar>
```

#### Toast

```tsx
<ToastProvider position="bottom">
  <App />
</ToastProvider>

const { toast } = useToast();
toast('Saved', { variant: 'success' });
```

#### Table

```tsx
<Table>
  <TableHeader>
    <TableRow><TableHead>Name</TableHead></TableRow>
  </TableHeader>
  <TableBody>
    <TableRow><TableCell>John</TableCell></TableRow>
  </TableBody>
</Table>
```

#### Breadcrumb

```tsx
<Breadcrumb>
  <BreadcrumbList>
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink onPress={() => {}}>Home</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
    <BreadcrumbSeparator />
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink>Docs</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
  </BreadcrumbList>
</Breadcrumb>
```

#### Stepper

```tsx
<Stepper activeStep={1} orientation="horizontal">
  <Step title="Account" description="Create account" />
  <Step title="Done" />
</Stepper>
```

#### Progress

```tsx
<Progress value={75} />
<Progress value={60} variant="circular" showLabel />
```

#### Slider

```tsx
<Slider defaultValue={50} min={0} max={100} />
```

#### Indicator

```tsx
<Indicator variant="success" animated />
```

#### Skeleton

```tsx
<Skeleton variant="text" lines={3} />
<Skeleton variant="circular" width={48} height={48} />
```

#### CodeBlock

```tsx
<CodeBlock code={`const x = 1;`} language="typescript" showLineNumbers />
```

#### Divider

```tsx
<Divider />
<Divider variant="thick" />
```

#### EmptyState

```tsx
<EmptyState icon={<Inbox size={48} />} title="No items" description="Get started." action={<Button>Create</Button>} />
```

#### DatePicker

```tsx
<DatePicker label="Start date" value={date} onChange={setDate} mode="date" />
```

#### ColorPicker

```tsx
<ColorPicker label="Color" value={color} onChange={setColor} />
```

#### FloatingMenuBar

```tsx
<FloatingMenuBar
  items={[
    { icon: <Home size={20} />, label: 'Home', active: true },
    { icon: <Search size={20} />, label: 'Search' },
  ]}
/>
```

#### VStack & HStack

```tsx
<VStack gap="md" align="center">
  <Input label="Name" />
  <Button>Submit</Button>
</VStack>

<HStack gap="sm" justify="between">
  <Badge>Tag 1</Badge>
  <Badge>Tag 2</Badge>
</HStack>
```

### Motion Constants

```tsx
import { springConfigs, duration, tacSpring } from '@tac-ui/native';

// springConfigs: snappy, gentle, bouncy, magnetic, entrance, light, heavy
// duration: instant (80ms), fast (150ms), normal (220ms), slow (320ms), complex (450ms)
```

---

## Icons

```tsx
// Web
import { Search, Star, Check, X, ArrowRight, TacLogo } from '@tac-ui/icon';

// Native
import { Search, Star, Check, TacLogo } from '@tac-ui/icon-native';
```

All [lucide-react](https://lucide.dev/icons) icons are re-exported, plus the custom `TacLogo`.

---

## Design Tokens

```tsx
import { primitiveColors, semanticTokens, spacing, typography, motion, diaSpring } from '@tac-ui/tokens';

// Native-specific
import { buildNativeTheme, nativeShadows } from '@tac-ui/tokens/native';
```

### CSS Custom Properties (Web)

Colors: `--background`, `--foreground`, `--border`, `--card`, `--primary`, `--point`, `--muted-foreground`, `--success`, `--error`, `--warning`, `--info`

Spacing: `--spacing-2xs` through `--spacing-3xl`

Radius: `--radius-none`, `--radius-xs`, `--radius-sm`, `--radius-m`, `--radius-lg`, `--radius-xl`, `--radius-2xl`, `--radius-pill`

Shadows: `--shadow-sm`, `--shadow-m`, `--shadow-lg`, `--shadow-xl`

Motion: `--duration-instant` (80ms), `--duration-fast` (150ms), `--duration-normal` (220ms), `--duration-slow` (320ms), `--duration-complex` (450ms)

Easing: `--ease-standard`, `--ease-in`, `--ease-out`, `--ease-in-out`, `--ease-bounce`, `--ease-spring`

Z-Index: `--z-dropdown`, `--z-sticky`, `--z-overlay`, `--z-modal`, `--z-popover`, `--z-tooltip`, `--z-toast`

Charts: `--chart-1` through `--chart-8`

### Brand Colors

Point accent: Royal Indigo — Light `#5856D6`, Dark `#5E5CE6`
Primary: Ink Black `#18181B` (light) / Near-White `#FAFAFA` (dark)
Neutral: Zinc scale

---

## Theming

### Web

```tsx
import { TacProvider, useTacTheme } from '@tac-ui/web';

<TacProvider defaultTheme="system"><App /></TacProvider>

const { preference, setPreference } = useTacTheme();
// preference: 'light' | 'dark' | 'system'
```

Themes applied via `data-theme` attribute. Use `data-no-bg-transition` to skip background transitions.

### Native

```tsx
import { TacNativeProvider, useTacNativeTheme } from '@tac-ui/native';

<TacNativeProvider defaultPreference="system"><App /></TacNativeProvider>

const { theme, preference, setPreference } = useTacNativeTheme();
// theme.colors.*, theme.spacing.*, theme.typography.*
```

---

## Tech Stack

- TypeScript (strict), React 18/19, ES2020 target
- Web: Tailwind CSS 4, Framer Motion, CVA + clsx + tailwind-merge, lucide-react
- Native: React Native Animated + Reanimated, StyleSheet, lucide-react-native
- Build: tsup (dual CJS/ESM), Turborepo, pnpm 9.15
- Docs: Next.js 16
